title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat backend in chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with synchronous, asynchronous, and reactive APIs; Spring Boot starter included.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API for chat, generate, pull, and embed in Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat built on top of Ollama with conversation history, markdown rendering, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s place with inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-chat-app
summary: Minimal React chat app using Vite and the Ollama JS client; showcases streaming and model switching.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and dependency-injection friendly design.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Superagent RAG template that ingests PDFs into Chroma and uses Ollama embeddings + chat for local Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger pipeline example that pulls an Ollama model, runs tests against it, and publishes the container.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module wrapping Ollama JS client for dependency injection and async providers in TypeScript backends.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with generate, chat, pull, and embed methods; used by the CLI itself.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfiles for Llama 3, Phi-3, Starling, and more with quantized GGUF downloads.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async and sync clients for Ollama with Tokio and reqwest.
